notes: Two-leg NZDUSD/EURJPY market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar (OOS net Sharpe 0.68 vs 0.8), but it is the strongest unbuilt pair after QM5_12624 with both positive DEV and OOS Sharpe and a coherent shared-EUR cross structure.
Q02 uses USD tester currency and the canonical RISK_FIXED=1000 budget. The EA selects NZDUSD/EURJPY plus EURUSD/GBPUSD/AUDUSD conversion history.
